inline_comments.message: It is much better to have these values in values.yaml and here reference to those parameters.
Certainly, there are other property values too in the file that need to be moved. It will be handled as a part of https://jira.onap.org/browse/PORTAL-452

Are you sure about this?
If it is used for internal applications communication, it should stay internal port.

root@borislav-rancher:~/onap/master/oom/kubernetes# grep -r portalPort
portal/values.yaml:  portalPort: "8989"
portal/charts/portal-widget/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPWIDGETMS/application.properties:initialization.widgetData.url=http://portal-app:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/commonWidgets
portal/charts/portal-app/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTAL/portal.properties:ecomp_redirect_url = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/login.htm
portal/charts/portal-app/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTAL/portal.properties:ecomp_rest_url = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/auxapi
portal/charts/portal-app/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTAL/openid-connect.properties:ecomp_openid_connect_client = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/openid_connect_login
portal/charts/portal-app/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTAL/openid-connect.properties:ecomp_redirect_uri = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/welcome.htm
portal/charts/portal-app/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTAL/system.properties:frontend_url                  = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPor }}/ONAPPORTAL/applicationsHome
portal/charts/portal-app/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTAL/fusion.properties:login_url_no_ret_val = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/login.htm
portal/charts/portal-sdk/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTALSDK/portal.properties:ecomp_redirect_url = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/login.htm
portal/charts/portal-sdk/resources/config/deliveries/properties/ONAPPORTALSDK/portal.properties:ecomp_rest_url = http://{{.Values.global.portalHostName}}:{{.Values.global.portalPort}}/ONAPPORTAL/auxapi
